'''The Reverend''' was a huge, bushy-[[Hair/Legends|bearded]] regular of the [[LoBue Cantina]] located in the [[Abregado-rae Spaceport]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]] during [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] bid for [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] conquest in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]. He was [[Fynn Torve]]'s contact for smuggling food and basic supplies to the [[Gado Hill Clans]]. Han Solo suspected him to be an extremist religious figure, based on his title and a [[Color/Legends|black]], [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]]-embedded [[Necklace/Legends|necklace]] he wore. The Reverend played along with this characterization, making others believe he sought the elimination of all [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]]. He caused a scene at the LoBue and accused [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] of cheating at [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]], causing a scene that eventually enabled Solo, [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], and Torve to escape the scrutiny of the Abregado security forces.

==Appearances==
*''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' {{Ab|Heir to the Empire (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
